odeProperty.value: THE MAGIC FOREST: GUARDIAN OF NATURE
Science and English Project for 4th Grade Primary Education

Situación de Aprendizaje interdisciplinar dirigida al alumnado de 4º de Educación Primaria en un contexto bilingüe.
El proyecto trabaja el cuidado del medioambiente y los ecosistemas mediante metodologías activas, herramientas digitales y actividades cooperativas. El alumnado elaborará una campaña digital de concienciación medioambiental utilizando diferentes recursos tecnológicos.
El recurso ha sido diseñado siguiendo principios DUA, fomentando la creatividad, la competencia digital y el aprendizaje significativo.

odeComponent.htmlView:
Welcome to our magical adventure!

In this project we will become guardians of nature and learn how to protect our planet through games, challenges and digital tools.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779812492954-3nroj06xi","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Welcome to our magical adventure!

\n

In this project we will become guardians of nature and learn how to protect our planet through games, challenges and digital tools.

\n

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Welcome!
You are about to start a new adventure.
First, take a look at this presentation to discover what our project is about, who we are going to help, and what challenges we will face.

https://www.canva.com/design/DAHKBneatP0/UQAgNdADHtgRK7C4yR-aBw/edit

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Bienvenidos!

Estamos a punto de comenzar una nueva aventura.

Primero, echad un vistazo a la presentación para descubrir sobre que va nuestro proyecto, a quién va dirigido, temporalización de dicho proyecto y con que retos nos encontraremos entre otras cosas.

https://www.canva.com/design/DAHKBneatP0/UQAgNdADHtgRK7C4yR-aBw/edit
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779811352611-nzxc762rg","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Welcome!
You are about to start a new adventure.
First, take a look at this presentation to discover what our project is about, who we are going to help, and what challenges we will face.

https://www.canva.com/design/DAHKBneatP0/UQAgNdADHtgRK7C4yR-aBw/edit

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Bienvenidos!

Estamos a punto de comenzar una nueva aventura.

Primero, echad un vistazo a la presentación para descubrir sobre que va nuestro proyecto, a quién va dirigido, temporalización de dicho proyecto y con que retos nos encontraremos entre otras cosas.

https://www.canva.com/design/DAHKBneatP0/UQAgNdADHtgRK7C4yR-aBw/edit

odeNavStructure.pageName: 3. WHAT ARE WE GOING TO LEARN?

odeNavStructureProperty.value: 3. WHAT ARE WE GOING TO LEARN?

odePagStructure.blockName: WHAT ARE WE GOING TO LEARN

odeComponent.htmlView:
THE MAGIC FOREST.pptx

Aquí podréis observar varios aspectos del proyecto que vamos a aprender:

- El "topic" versa sobre la naturaleza.

- Descubriremos como proteger el medioambiente.

- Utilizaremos herramientas digitales tales como:

                * Canva

                * Genially

                * Padlet

Entre otros muchos que podéis ver en la presentación.

- Se trabajará de forma cooperativa

- Se creará como producto final una campaña digital
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779860392369-y9m0qiekw","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"


THE MAGIC FOREST.pptx

Aquí podréis observar varios aspectos del proyecto que vamos a aprender:

- El "topic" versa sobre la naturaleza.

- Descubriremos como proteger el medioambiente.

- Utilizaremos herramientas digitales tales como:

                * Canva

                * Genially

                * Padlet

Entre otros muchos que podéis ver en la presentación.

- Se trabajará de forma cooperativa

- Se creará como producto final una campaña digital


","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779862546672-1498ay53o","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Welcome to our final mission! 🌍✨

In this project, you will work with your team to help save the Magic Forest and protect nature.

Together, you will create a digital environmental campaign to teach other people how to care for the planet.

What will you create? 🤔

🌱 Posters about nature and recycling  
♻️ Eco-friendly ideas to protect animals and forests  
💻 Digital creations using fun online tools  
🗣️ An oral presentation in English  
🤝 Teamwork activities with your classmates  

During the project, you will use different digital tools such as:

🎨 Canva  
📌 Padlet  
🎮 Kahoot  
✨ Genially  

You will investigate, play, create and share your ideas like real nature heroes!

At the end of the project, each team will present their campaign to the class and show how we can all help our planet.

🌟 Are you ready to become a Guardian of Nature? 🌟
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779887560021-8yelwoqyf","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

 
Welcome to our final mission! 🌍✨

In this project, you will work with your team to help save the Magic Forest and protect nature.

Together, you will create a digital environmental campaign to teach other people how to care for the planet.

What will you create? 🤔

🌱 Posters about nature and recycling  
♻️ Eco-friendly ideas to protect animals and forests  
💻 Digital creations using fun online tools  
🗣️ An oral presentation in English  
🤝 Teamwork activities with your classmates  

During the project, you will use different digital tools such as:

🎨 Canva  
📌 Padlet  
🎮 Kahoot  
✨ Genially  

You will investigate, play, create and share your ideas like real nature heroes!

At the end of the project, each team will present their campaign to the class and show how we can all help our planet.

🌟 Are you ready to become a Guardian of Nature? 🌟




","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odePagStructure.blockName: The tools we will use in our adventure!

odeComponent.htmlView:
During this project, we will use different digital tools to learn, play, create and work together. 🌍✨

Here are our magic digital tools:

🎨 Canva  
We will create posters, cards and beautiful digital designs.

📌 Padlet  
We will share ideas, images and interesting information with our classmates.

✨ Genially  
We will create interactive activities and fun challenges.

🎮 Kahoot  
We will play quizzes and review what we have learned.

🔍 Wakelet  
We will collect useful videos, websites and resources about nature.

💻 Computers and digital boards  
We will investigate, collaborate and present our work.

🌟 Remember:
We must always use technology safely, respectfully and responsibly.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779892655248-iw7uflvu1","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

During this project, we will use different digital tools to learn, play, create and work together. 🌍✨

Here are our magic digital tools:

🎨 Canva  
We will create posters, cards and beautiful digital designs.

📌 Padlet  
We will share ideas, images and interesting information with our classmates.

✨ Genially  
We will create interactive activities and fun challenges.

🎮 Kahoot  
We will play quizzes and review what we have learned.

🔍 Wakelet  
We will collect useful videos, websites and resources about nature.

💻 Computers and digital boards  
We will investigate, collaborate and present our work.

🌟 Remember:
We must always use technology safely, respectfully and responsibly.

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Get ready for an exciting adventure through the Magic Forest! 🌳✨

In this project, we will complete different missions and challenges to become true Guardians of Nature.

Each step of our journey will help us:
🌱 Learn about the environment
♻️ Discover how to protect our planet
🤝 Work cooperatively with our classmates
💻 Use digital tools responsibly
🎨 Create amazing projects and presentations

Follow our timeline to see all the activities, missions and challenges we will complete together during this magical adventure!
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779893042264-f7pewrj1g","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"


Get ready for an exciting adventure through the Magic Forest! 🌳✨

In this project, we will complete different missions and challenges to become true Guardians of Nature.

Each step of our journey will help us:
🌱 Learn about the environment
♻️ Discover how to protect our planet
🤝 Work cooperatively with our classmates
💻 Use digital tools responsibly
🎨 Create amazing projects and presentations

Follow our timeline to see all the activities, missions and challenges we will complete together during this magical adventure!




","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odePagStructure.blockName: Look for the missions you have to do now.

odeComponent.htmlView:
🎥 Session 1:
Watch videos about nature and pollution in padlet

💬 Share your ideas with your classmates.

🔍 Session 2:
Investigate animals, forests and ecosystems.

💻 Use Padlet and Wakelet to collect information.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779895855225-jl63tngua","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

🎥 Session 1:
Watch videos about nature and pollution in padlet

💬 Share your ideas with your classmates.

🔍 Session 2:
Investigate animals, forests and ecosystems.

💻 Use Padlet and Wakelet to collect information.
 
 

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
🎮 Session 3:
Play recycling games and learn about sustainability.

🌱 Session 4:
Create nature vocabulary cards and digital posters using Canva.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779897349650-ofv1pdhbf","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

🎮 Session 3:
Play recycling games and learn about sustainability.

\n

🌱 Session 4:
Create nature vocabulary cards and digital posters using Canva.

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
Session 5

🤝 Work cooperatively with your team.

💡 Solve environmental challenges together.

✨ Create interactive activities using Genially.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779897487565-f3oy4lvqh","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Session 5

🤝 Work cooperatively with your team.

💡 Solve environmental challenges together.

✨ Create interactive activities using Genially.

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
🖥️ Session 6:
Design your environmental campaign using Canva.

🗣️ Session 7:
Prepare and present your oral presentation in English.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779897610896-9vu8wljsa","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

Design your environmental campaign using Canva.

\n

🗣️ Session 7:
Prepare and present your oral presentation in English.
 

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
🎤 Present your final project to the class.

⭐ Reflect on what you have learned.

🎮 Complete the final Kahoot challenge.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779897669949-om4g54m5t","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

🎤 Present your final project to the class.

\n

⭐ Reflect on what you have learned.

\n

🎮 Complete the final Kahoot challenge.
 

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
During this project, you will learn many new things while having fun and working with your classmates! 🌳✨

Your teacher will observe:
🌱 Your participation
🤝 Your teamwork
💻 Your use of digital tools
🗣️ Your English communication
🎨 Your creativity
♻️ Your ideas about protecting nature

You will also:
⭐ Reflect on your own learning
⭐ Complete self-assessment activities
⭐ Help your classmates
⭐ Receive feedback to improve step by step

At the end of the project:
🎤 You will present your environmental campaign.
🎮 You will complete a fun Kahoot challenge.
🌟 You will become a true Guardian of Nature!

Remember:
Mistakes help us learn and grow! 💚
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1779898581571-bjyn8i6v7","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

🗣️ Your English communication
🎨 Your creativity
♻️ Your ideas about protecting nature

You will also:
⭐ Reflect on your own learning
⭐ Complete self-assessment activities
⭐ Help your classmates
⭐ Receive feedback to improve step by step

At the end of the project:
🎤 You will present your environmental campaign.
🎮 You will complete a fun Kahoot challenge.
🌟 You will become a true Guardian of Nature!

Remember:
Mistakes help us learn and grow! 💚

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
This section is intended for teachers who wish to implement this project in their classrooms.

Here you will find information about the assessment criteria, methodology, organisation of sessions, attention to diversity and the assessment instruments used throughout the project.
 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Esta sección está dirigida a docentes que deseen implementar este proyecto en sus aulas.

Aquí encontrarán información sobre los criterios de evaluación, la metodología, la organización de las sesiones, la atención a la diversidad y los instrumentos de evaluación utilizados a lo largo del proyecto.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1780307069832-giavrrgvb","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

This section is intended for teachers who wish to implement this project in their classrooms.

Here you will find information about the assessment criteria, methodology, organisation of sessions, attention to diversity and the assessment instruments used throughout the project.
 ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Esta sección está dirigida a docentes que deseen implementar este proyecto en sus aulas.

Aquí encontrarán información sobre los criterios de evaluación, la metodología, la organización de las sesiones, la atención a la diversidad y los instrumentos de evaluación utilizados a lo largo del proyecto.

 

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
The project is based on active methodologies, cooperative learning and the responsible use of digital technologies.

Students work individually, in pairs and in cooperative groups to complete meaningful tasks connected to environmental awareness and sustainability.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

El proyecto se basa en metodologías activas, aprendizaje cooperativo y el uso responsable de las tecnologías digitales.

Los estudiantes trabajan individualmente, en parejas y en grupos cooperativos para completar tareas significativas relacionadas con la conciencia ambiental y la sostenibilidad.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1780307797576-abb98zip2","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

The project is based on active methodologies, cooperative learning and the responsible use of digital technologies.

Students work individually, in pairs and in cooperative groups to complete meaningful tasks connected to environmental awareness and sustainability.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

El proyecto se basa en metodologías activas, aprendizaje cooperativo y el uso responsable de las tecnologías digitales.

Los estudiantes trabajan individualmente, en parejas y en grupos cooperativos para completar tareas significativas relacionadas con la conciencia ambiental y la sostenibilidad.

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
The project follows the principles of Universal Design for Learning (UDL).

Visual supports, flexible grouping, digital resources and differentiated tasks are provided to ensure the participation of all learners.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

El proyecto se rige por los principios del Diseño Universal para el Aprendizaje (DUA).

Se proporcionan apoyos visuales, agrupaciones flexibles, recursos digitales y tareas diferenciadas para garantizar la participación de todos los estudiantes.
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1780307948028-3dv96t2bm","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

The project follows the principles of Universal Design for Learning (UDL).

Visual supports, flexible grouping, digital resources and differentiated tasks are provided to ensure the participation of all learners.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

El proyecto se rige por los principios del Diseño Universal para el Aprendizaje (DUA).

Se proporcionan apoyos visuales, agrupaciones flexibles, recursos digitales y tareas diferenciadas para garantizar la participación de todos los estudiantes.

","textFeedbackInput":"Mostrar retroalimentación","textFeedbackTextarea":""}

odeComponent.htmlView:
🌟Title: The Magic Forest: Guardians of Nature

      Educational Level: 4th Grade Primary Education

      School Year: 2025–2026

     Language: English (Bilingual Education)

👩‍🏫AUTHOR

Eva Talavera Bailén

This educational resource has been created as part of the Digital Teaching Competence B2 Training Programme

📖 PROYECT DESCRIPTION
"The Magic Forest: Guardians of Nature" is an interdisciplinary learning project designed for 4th Grade Primary Education students.

Through cooperative learning, digital tools and environmental challenges, students develop their digital competence, creativity, communication skills and environmental awareness while creating a digital campaign to protect nature.

🛠️DIGITAL TOOL USED

- eXeLearning 3
- Canva
- Padlet
- Wakelet
- Genially
- Kahoot
- YouTube

🌍 ACCESSIBILITY AND INCLUSION
This project has been designed following the principles of Universal Design for Learning (UDL), promoting participation, accessibility and inclusion for all learners.

 
📄 LICENSE
Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-SA 4.0)

You are free to share and adapt this resource provided that appropriate credit is given and any adaptations are distributed under the same licence.

 
⬇️EDITABLE VERSION
The editable eXeLearning file is available for download and adaptation for educational purposes.

Thank you for visiting our project!

🌳 Together, we can become true Guardians of Nature! 🌍✨

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🌟Título: El Bosque Mágico: Guardianes de la Naturaleza

     Nivel Educativo: 4.º de Educación Primaria

     Curso Escolar: 2025-2026

     Idioma: Inglés (Educación Bilingüe)

👩‍🏫AUTOR

Eva Talavera Bailén

Este recurso educativo se ha creado como parte del Programa de Formación en Competencia Docente Digital B2.

📖DESCRIPCIÓN DEL PROYECTO

"El Bosque Mágico: Guardianes de la Naturaleza" es un proyecto de aprendizaje interdisciplinario diseñado para estudiantes de cuarto grado de primaria.

Mediante el aprendizaje cooperativo, herramientas digitales y desafíos ambientales, los estudiantes desarrollan su competencia digital, creatividad, habilidades comunicativas y conciencia ambiental al tiempo que crean una campaña digital para proteger la naturaleza.

 

🛠️ HERRAMIENTAS DIGITALES UTILIZADAS
- eXeLearning 3
- Canva
- Padlet
- Wakelet
- Genially
- Kahoot
- YouTube

🌍 ACCESIBILIDAD E INCLUSIÓN
Este proyecto ha sido diseñado siguiendo los principios del Diseño Universal para el Aprendizaje (DUA), promoviendo la participación, la accesibilidad y la inclusión de todos los estudiantes.

 

📄 LICENCIA
Creative Commons Atribución-CompartirIgual 4.0 Internacional (CC BY-SA 4.0)

Puedes compartir y adaptar este recurso libremente, siempre que se otorgue el crédito correspondiente y cualquier adaptación se distribuya bajo la misma licencia.

 

⬇️ VERSIÓN EDITABLE
El archivo editable de eXeLearning está disponible para su descarga y adaptación con fines educativos.

¡Gracias por visitar nuestro proyecto!

🌳 ¡Juntos podemos convertirnos en verdaderos guardianes de la naturaleza! 🌍✨
odeComponent.jsonProperties:
{"ideviceId":"idevice-1780406200501-vjsgkn6j9","textInfoDurationInput":"","textInfoDurationTextInput":"Duración","textInfoParticipantsInput":"","textInfoParticipantsTextInput":"Agrupamiento","textTextarea":"

 🌟Title: The Magic Forest: Guardians of Nature

      Educational Level: 4th Grade Primary Education

      School Year: 2025–2026

     Language: English (Bilingual Education)

👩‍🏫AUTHOR

Eva Talavera Bailén

This educational resource has been created as part of the Digital Teaching Competence B2 Training Programme

📖 PROYECT DESCRIPTION
"The Magic Forest: Guardians of Nature" is an interdisciplinary learning project designed for 4th Grade Primary Education students.

Through cooperative learning, digital tools and environmental challenges, students develop their digital competence, creativity, communication skills and environmental awareness while creating a digital campaign to protect nature.

🛠️DIGITAL TOOL USED

- eXeLearning 3
- Canva
- Padlet
- Wakelet
- Genially
- Kahoot
- YouTube

🌍 ACCESSIBILITY AND INCLUSION
This project has been designed following the principles of Universal Design for Learning (UDL), promoting participation, accessibility and inclusion for all learners.

 
📄 LICENSE
Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-SA 4.0)

You are free to share and adapt this resource provided that appropriate credit is given and any adaptations are distributed under the same licence.

 
⬇️EDITABLE VERSION

Thank you for visiting our project!

🌳 Together, we can become true Guardians of Nature! 🌍✨

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🌟Título: El Bosque Mágico: Guardianes de la Naturaleza

     Nivel Educativo: 4.º de Educación Primaria

     Curso Escolar: 2025-2026

     Idioma: Inglés (Educación Bilingüe)

👩‍🏫AUTOR

Eva Talavera Bailén

Este recurso educativo se ha creado como parte del Programa de Formación en Competencia Docente Digital B2.

📖DESCRIPCIÓN DEL PROYECTO

"El Bosque Mágico: Guardianes de la Naturaleza" es un proyecto de aprendizaje interdisciplinario diseñado para estudiantes de cuarto grado de primaria.

Mediante el aprendizaje cooperativo, herramientas digitales y desafíos ambientales, los estudiantes desarrollan su competencia digital, creatividad, habilidades comunicativas y conciencia ambiental al tiempo que crean una campaña digital para proteger la naturaleza.

 

🛠️ HERRAMIENTAS DIGITALES UTILIZADAS
- eXeLearning 3
- Canva
- Padlet
- Wakelet
- Genially
- Kahoot
- YouTube

🌍 ACCESIBILIDAD E INCLUSIÓN
Este proyecto ha sido diseñado siguiendo los principios del Diseño Universal para el Aprendizaje (DUA), promoviendo la participación, la accesibilidad y la inclusión de todos los estudiantes.

 

📄 LICENCIA

Puedes compartir y adaptar este recurso libremente, siempre que se otorgue el crédito correspondiente y cualquier adaptación se distribuya bajo la misma licencia.

 

⬇️ VERSIÓN EDITABLE
El archivo editable de eXeLearning está disponible para su descarga y adaptación con fines educativos.

¡Gracias por visitar nuestro proyecto!

🌳 ¡Juntos podemos convertirnos en verdaderos guardianes de la naturaleza! 🌍✨
